allow: Bash(mount | grep /app && ls -la /app/ && touch /app/test-write 2>&1 || echo "ROOT /app not writable")

Bash(\\
./bake-template.sh aioo test-procenteo procenteo && \\
echo "" && echo "=== Instance contents ===" && \\
ls -la instances/aioo-test-procenteo/ && \\
cat instances/aioo-test-procenteo/.instance.env && \\
echo "" && echo "NORTHSTAR injected:" && \\
head -2 instances/aioo-test-procenteo/NORTHSTAR.md && \\
rm -rf instances/aioo-test-procenteo && echo "" && echo "✅ bake-template test passed, cleaned up")
